entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY AND BREEZY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
BREEZY WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
